About the Artist

Bold colour,
raw emotion.

Gala Braun is an abstract and pop artist whose work is defined by fearless colour, explosive energy, and an unmistakable personal voice. Every canvas is an invitation to feel something.

Her paintings merge the spontaneity of abstract expressionism with the visual punch of pop art — creating works that command attention and spark joy in any space.

Based in Israel, Gala creates original paintings and bespoke commissions for collectors worldwide.
